title: Biometric Login Success
description: Verify that a user can successfully log in using the biometric WebAuthn authentication method.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Select biometric login using WebAuthn.
Provide valid biometric credentials.
Verify login is successful and user is directed to the dashboard.

title: Biometric Login Failure with Invalid Data
description: Check that biometric login fails gracefully with invalid biometric data and appropriate error message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Select biometric login using WebAuthn.
Provide invalid biometric credentials.
Verify login is denied with relevant error message displayed to the user.

title: Two-Factor Authentication with TOTP Success
description: Verify that two-factor authentication using Time-based One-Time Password (TOTP) works correctly after entering valid username and password.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Input valid username and password.
Submit credentials.
Enter valid TOTP code from authenticator app.
Verify user successfully logs in and is directed to the dashboard.

title: Two-Factor Authentication with TOTP Failure
description: Check system response to an invalid TOTP code to ensure login does not proceed without valid second-factor authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Input valid username and password.
Submit credentials.
Enter invalid TOTP code.
Verify user is denied access with appropriate error notification.

title: Magic Link Login Success
description: Verify that a user can log in successfully via a magic link sent to their registered email address.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Request magic link by entering registered email.
Open the magic link from email.
Verify user is authenticated and redirected to dashboard without additional login steps.

title: Session Tracking and Expiry
description: Verify that user sessions are tracked properly and sessions expire after inactivity timeout according to policy.

steps.description: Log in with valid credentials.
Remain inactive for the configured session timeout period.
Verify session expires and user is logged out automatically.
Attempt to perform an authenticated action post-timeout.
Verify action is denied and user is prompted to log in again.

title: Security Logging on Failed Login Attempts
description: Verify that failed login attempts are properly logged with relevant security event details.

steps.description: Attempt login with invalid credentials multiple times.
Verify security logs capture each failed login attempt with timestamp, IP address, and login identifier.

title: AI Exam Generator Produces Valid Exam
description: Verify that the AI-powered exam generator outputs exams containing appropriate questions based on selected topics and difficulty levels.

steps.description: Login as a teacher and navigate to exam generation page.
Select subject, topics, number of questions, and difficulty level.
Generate exam using AI module.
Verify exam consists of the requested number of questions relevant to specified topics and difficulty.

title: AI Study Assistant Provides Relevant Answers
description: Validate that the AI study assistant chatbot responds with relevant and helpful answers to typical student queries about course material.

steps.description: Login as a student and open study assistant chatbot.
Ask a question related to enrolled course material.
Verify the chatbot responds with accurate, relevant, and context-aware answers.

title: Smart Teacher Search Yields Accurate Results
description: Ensure the AI-powered teacher and content search returns correct and ranked results based on user criteria and input.

steps.description: Navigate to teacher search page.
Input search criteria including subject, expertise, and location.
Submit search request.
Verify search results are relevant, ranked properly, and match criteria.

title: LMS Course Content Display
description: Verify that students can access and view course content and lesson materials without errors across different browsers and devices.

steps.description: Login as a student.
Select an enrolled course.
Open various lessons and multimedia content.
Verify all course content is loaded and displayed correctly without broken elements.

title: Exam Taking with Automatic Grading
description: Verify that students can take AI-generated exams and receive automatic grading and detailed feedback immediately after submission.

steps.description: Login as a student and navigate to available exam.
Complete the exam and submit answers.
Verify automatic grading is performed accurately and detailed feedback is displayed.

title: Educational Resource Library Management
description: Verify that teachers can upload, edit, and delete resources in the educational resource library and that students can access available resources.

steps.description: Login as a teacher.
Upload a new educational resource.
Verify the resource appears in the library.
Edit the resource metadata.
Verify the updates are reflected correctly.
Delete the resource.
Verify the resource is removed from the library.
Login as a student and access the resource library.
Verify resources are accessible and downloadable based on permissions.

title: Gamification Achievement Awarding
description: Verify that users receive achievements and points correctly after completing predefined milestones and actions.

steps.description: Perform actions that trigger achievement awarding (e.g., complete a course, pass an exam).
Verify achievements and points are awarded and reflected in user profile.

title: Leaderboard Real-Time Update
description: Ensure that the leaderboard updates in real-time as users gain points or achievements, with minimal latency.

steps.description: Trigger points/achievements updates for one user.
Verify leaderboard instantly reflects updated rankings across all logged-in users.

title: Real-Time Chat Message Delivery
description: Verify that WebSocket-based chat messages are delivered reliably and with minimal latency between users in real-time chat or forums.

steps.description: Login with two separate user accounts in different browsers.
Send chat message from one user to the other.
Verify the message is received instantly and accurately by the recipient.

title: Notifications Received in Real-Time
description: Verify that notifications for forum replies, messages, and system alerts are delivered to users in real-time.

steps.description: Trigger a notification event (e.g., reply on forum post) targeted to a user.
Verify the user receives the notification immediately through UI and/or WebSocket push.

title: Study Schedule Creation and Reminder Alerts
description: Verify that users can create study schedules with reminders and receive alerts as scheduled.

steps.description: Login as a student.
Create a weekly study schedule with specific time slots and reminders.
Verify the schedule is saved and displayed correctly.
Wait until reminder time.
Verify user receives reminder notification per the schedule.

title: Study Timer Functionality
description: Verify that the study timer can be started, paused, resumed, and stopped correctly, with accurate time tracking.

steps.description: Login as a user.
Start the study timer.
Pause the timer after a few minutes.
Verify the timer pauses and timing stops incrementing.
Resume the timer.
Verify timer resumes tracking elapsed time.
Stop the timer.
Verify total tracked time is correctly recorded and displayed.

title: Cache Effectiveness and Performance Benchmark
description: Verify that caching mechanisms improve performance and reduce backend load under typical and peak user load scenarios.

steps.description: Perform repeated requests to API endpoints with and without caching enabled.
Measure and compare response times to ensure caching improves latency.
Simulate high concurrent user load.
Verify system meets established performance benchmarks and no errors or timeouts occur.

title: Infrastructure Deployment with Zero Downtime
description: Verify that deploying infrastructure updates via Kubernetes and Terraform completes successfully without service interruptions.

steps.description: Trigger deployment of updated infrastructure using Terraform and Kubernetes manifests.
Verify deployment completes with no downtime by monitoring service availability during rollout.
Verify all components transition to healthy state post deployment.

title: Monitoring Alerts Triggering
description: Verify that Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK stack monitoring triggers alerts for set thresholds and errors in real-time.

steps.description: Simulate conditions breaching threshold metrics (e.g., high CPU, failed API calls).
Verify monitoring dashboards update accordingly and alerts are generated and sent.

title: UI Accessibility and RTL Language Support
description: Verify that the UI supports accessibility guidelines and renders correctly with right-to-left (RTL) language settings.

steps.description: Set application interface language to an RTL language.
Navigate through key UI components such as login, dashboard, course pages, and chat.
Verify all UI elements correctly align and text flows properly according to RTL standards.
Verify accessibility features such as keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility.

title: Dark Mode and Light Mode Theme Toggling
description: Verify that users can switch between dark mode and light mode themes and the UI updates consistent with user preference.

steps.description: Login and locate theme toggle control.
Switch from light mode to dark mode.
Verify UI theme changes reflect dark mode styles across all visible components.
Switch back to light mode.
Verify UI theme reverts to light mode styles correctly.
